title: Justago cleomoides
taxonomy: Justago cleomoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is commonly known as the Justago cleomoides. This species is classified in the genus Justago. Further classification includes it as a member of the order Brassicales. The family and order of classification are both part of the larger group of flowering plants known as the angiosperms.

Its roots are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal potential and its safety for human consumption.
